view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for resource dependencies.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for resource dependencies.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for resource dependencies.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation that all necessary resources (venue, catering, AV, and staff) can be booked together, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided only confirms that a primary offer was booked, which does not explicitly demonstrate that all required components are included in a single booking. The linked use case mentions the need for 'Resource dependencies', but the evidence does not confirm that these elements are bundled together in the booking process.
